subcodes.first_line: The mention of God from the Lote-Tree of man hath, in truth, been raised up. Blessed is he who hath turned unto Him and hearkened unto that which He uttered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله من سدره الانسان قد ارتفع بالحق طوبی لمن اقبل الیه و سمع ما نطق به
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
